content: Persist the cart across browser sessions so the same user sees the same line items on desktop and mobile.
I'll move cart state out of localStorage into a database-backed session. Starting with the schema migration.

input.hunk: +export const cartItems = pgTable('cart_items', { sessionId: text('session_id').notNull(), productId: uuid('product_id').notNull(), qty: integer('qty').notNull() });

name: Bash
stdout: cart_items table created. Migration written to drizzle/migrations/0042_cart_items.sql

content: Also invalidate the cart on logout so the next user on the same device doesn't inherit it.
Adding a DELETE on cart_items keyed by sessionId in the logout server action.
